title: Hubsafio MOD
body:
A mod that implements various things of Dedsafio Series

(still in beta)  

 

Mod Functions:

Infinite Totem (It wastes with 5 usages)

Totem Nutria (It gives you full health when wasted totem)

Totem Messages (It say a message when somenone use a totem)

Some Experimental Mobs (They are Temporal)
